steps.description: Gene-level signal estimates were derived from the CEL files by RMA-sketch normalization as a method in the apt-probeset-summarize program (see Yeo et al.
Hierarchical clustering of the full dataset by probeset values was performed by complete linkage using Euclidean distance as a similarity metric in Matlab.

raw_text: Gene-level signal estimates were derived from the CEL files by RMA-sketch normalization as a method in the apt-probeset-summarize program (see Yeo et al. 2007; PMID 7967047). Hierarchical clustering of the full dataset by probeset values was performed by complete linkage using Euclidean distance as a similarity metric in Matlab.
